name: gen
description: Premium frontend design system for Claude Code v3.4.1 — 3dsvg Hero Mark Automation. 26 commands, 21-agent pipeline, ~153 skills, 8 MCP integrations. v3.4 3dsvg integration: 75 archetype-curated presets with AJV schema, `<GenorahSVG3D>` accessibility wrapper pattern, SVG input sanitization (XXE/recursive-use/script rejection), Hero Mark Compliance sub-gate (5 binary checks), motion-health + perf-budgets coupling (3-instance WebGL cap, per-beat feasibility), `/gen:hero-mark` command (design/live/export/preview subcommands), 3dsvg-export MCP server (headless Playwright + registerCanvas render to PNG/MP4), brandkit 30-variant fan-out. Earlier v3.x primitives: closed-loop visual refiner, DNA drift detection (92% coverage hard gate), reference-diff-protocol (per-beat SSIM), AI variant tournament, section consistency auditor, live dashboard (localhost:4455), interactive click-to-refine companion, competitive benchmarking (Land-book + SiteInspire + Cosmos + Awwwards), smart intent router, self-audit with pre-push parity hook, kinetic typography (GSAP 3.13 free SplitText + variable-font morphing), Speculation Rules API, CSS Anchor Positioning, cross-document View Transitions, Next.js 16 Cache Components, Vite 8 + Rolldown, Flux 1.1 Pro + Ideogram 3, 7 new frameworks (Svelte 5, Vue 3, Nuxt 3), WebGPU/TSL, GLTF optimization (Draco + Meshopt + KTX2), Sanity + Payload CMS round-trip, Remotion section video, brand voice extractor, cognitive accessibility (CVD ΔE2000 + motion sickness), typography-rules (Butterick), anti-vanity-check, 25 Design Archetypes × 234-point weighted quality gate via 6-stage validation (DNA → render → registry → consistency → fidelity → full gate), Hero Mark + Motion Health + DNA Drift + Perf Budget sub-gates cascading into 234-pt total. Testing infrastructure: node:test, GH Actions validate workflow, self-audit runtime, pre-push mirror parity. Targets Next.js 16, Astro 6, SvelteKit 2, Nuxt 3, React/Vite 8, Tauri, Electron, mobile (SwiftUI 6, Compose Multiplatform 2.0, Expo SDK 52, Flutter 3.24, React Native). Creates Awwwards SOTD-ready (8.0+) websites with measurably enforced, closed-loop refinement.
